title: Murgers
description: Adds new food items that can just be used for hunger replenishment, or to give great - but balanced - buffs (or debuffs).
body:
### **THANKS SO MUCH FOR 100 DOWNLOADS**

Over 200 downloads now! Thank You!

# The Mod

A simple mod that adds a new food set and naturally generating structure to Minecraft.

Don't worry about the name, just accept it...

## Features

- Adds **10** new food items
  - Including recipes
- Adds **13** new advancements
- Adds a statistic
- Adds a naturally generating structure
  - With Murgers-related loot in
- Supports [Eating Animation](https://modrinth.com/mod/eating-animation)
- Now has HD resource pack

# Technical

The, less so, but still important bits

## Installation

Simply move the _.jar_ to your _"mods"_ folder in your minecraft directory.

> You will need [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) as well

## Links

My [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@JJplayz565) and my [Twitch](https://www.twitch.tv/jjplayz565).

The [GitHub](https://github.com/JJplayz565/Murgers) has the source code, issues page and a wiki.
